7255→            return emitInstCustomOperandFunc(\n  7256→                parent,\n  7257→                inst,\n  7258→                SpvOpVectorShuffle,\n  7259→                [&]()\n  7260→                {\n  7261→                    emitOperand(inst->getDataType());\n  7262→                    emitOperand(kResultID);\n  7263→                    emitOperand(inst->getBase());\n  7264→                    emitOperand(inst->getBase());\n  7265→                    for (UInt i = 0; i < inst->getElementCount(); i++)\n  7266→                    {\n  7267→                        auto index = as<IRIntLit>(inst->getElementIndex(i));\n  7268→                        emitOperand((SpvWord)index->getValue());\n  7269→                    }\n  7270→                });\n  7271→        }\n  7272→    }\n  7273→\n  7274→    SpvInst* emitIntCast(SpvInstParent* parent, IRIntCast* inst)\n  7275→    {\n  7276→        const auto fromTypeV = inst->getOperand(0)->getDataType();\n  7277→        const auto toTypeV = inst->getDataType();\n  7278→        SLANG_ASSERT(!as<IRVectorType>(fromTypeV) == !as<IRVectorType>(toTypeV));\n  7279→        const auto fromType = getVectorOrCoopMatrixElementType(fromTypeV);\n  7280→        const auto toType = getVectorOrCoopMatrixElementType(toTypeV);\n  7281→        IRBuilder builder(inst);\n  7282→\n  7283→        if (as<IRBoolType>(fromType))\n  7284→        {\n  7285→            // Cast from bool to int.\n  7286→            builder.setInsertBefore(inst);\n  7287→            auto zero = builder.getIntValue(toType, 0);\n  7288→            auto one = builder.getIntValue(toType, 1);\n  7289→            if (auto vecType = as<IRVectorType>(toTypeV))\n  7290→            {\n  7291→                auto zeroV =\n  7292→                    emitSplat(parent, nullptr, zero, getIntVal(vecType->getElementCount()));\n  7293→                auto oneV = emitSplat(parent, nullptr, one, getIntVal(vecType->getElementCount()));\n  7294→                return emitInst(\n  7295→                    parent,\n  7296→                    inst,\n  7297→                    SpvOpSelect,\n  7298→                    inst->getFullType(),\n  7299→                    kResultID,\n  7300→                    inst->getOperand(0),\n  7301→                    oneV,\n  7302→                    zeroV);\n  7303→            }\n  7304→            return emitInst(\n  7305→                parent,\n  7306→                inst,\n  7307→                SpvOpSelect,\n  7308→                inst->getFullType(),\n  7309→                kResultID,\n  7310→                inst->getOperand(0),\n  7311→                one,\n  7312→                zero);\n  7313→        }\n  7314→        else if (as<IRBoolType>(toType))\n  7315→        {\n  7316→            // Cast from int to bool.\n  7317→            builder.setInsertBefore(inst);\n  7318→            auto zero = builder.getIntValue(fromType, 0);\n  7319→            if (auto vecType = as<IRVectorType>(toTypeV))\n  7320→            {\n  7321→                auto zeroV =\n  7322→                    emitSplat(parent, nullptr, zero, getIntVal(vecType->getElementCount()));\n  7323→                return emitOpINotEqual(\n  7324→                    parent,\n  7325→                    inst,\n  7326→                    inst->getFullType(),\n  7327→                    inst->getOperand(0),\n  7328→                    zeroV);\n  7329→            }\n  7330→            else\n  7331→            {\n  7332→                return emitOpINotEqual(\n  7333→                    parent,\n  7334→                    inst,\n  7335→                    inst->getFullType(),\n  7336→                    inst->getOperand(0),\n  7337→                    zero);\n  7338→            }\n  7339→        }\n  7340→\n  7341→        SLANG_ASSERT(isIntegralType(fromType));\n  7342→        SLANG_ASSERT(isIntegralType(toType));\n  7343→\n  7344→        const auto fromInfo = getIntTypeInfo(fromType);\n  7345→        const auto toInfo = getIntTypeInfo(toType);\n  7346→\n  7347→        if (fromInfo == toInfo)\n  7348→        {\n  7349→            // Same exact integer types, copy the object.\n  7350→            return emitOpCopyObject(parent, inst, toTypeV, inst->getOperand(0));\n  7351→        }\n  7352→        else if (fromInfo.width == toInfo.width)\n  7353→        {\n  7354→            // Same bit width, perform bit cast.\n  7355→            return emitOpBitcast(parent, inst, toTypeV, inst->getOperand(0));\n  7356→        }\n  7357→        else if (!fromInfo.isSigned && !toInfo.isSigned)\n  7358→        {\n  7359→            // Unsigned to unsigned, don't sign extend.\n  7360→            return emitOpUConvert(parent, inst, toTypeV, inst->getOperand(0));\n  7361→        }\n  7362→        else if (!fromInfo.isSigned && toInfo.isSigned)\n  7363→        {\n  7364→            // Unsigned to signed with different widths, don't sign extend.\n  7365→            // Perform unsigned conversion first to an unsigned integer of the same width as the\n  7366→            // result then perform bit cast to the signed result type. This is done because SPIRV's\n  7367→            // unsigned conversion (`OpUConvert`) requires result type to be unsigned.\n  7368→            auto builderType = getUnsignedTypeFromSignedType(&builder, toTypeV);\n  7369→\n  7370→            auto unsignedV = emitOpUConvert(parent, nullptr, builderType, inst->getOperand(0));\n  7371→            return emitOpBitcast(parent, inst, toTypeV, unsignedV);\n  7372→        }\n  7373→        else if (fromInfo.isSigned)\n  7374→            // Signed to signed and signed to unsigned, sign extend.\n  7375→            return emitOpSConvert(parent, inst, toTypeV, inst->getOperand(0));\n  7376→\n  7377→        SLANG_UNREACHABLE(__func__);\n  7378→    }\n  7379→\n  7380→    SpvInst* emitFloatCastForMatrix(\n  7381→        SpvInstParent* parent,\n  7382→        IRFloatCast* inst,\n  7383→        IRMatrixType* fromTypeM,\n  7384→        IRMatrixType* toTypeM)\n  7385→    {\n  7386→        // Because there is no spirv instruction to convert matrix to matrix, we need to convert it\n  7387→        // row by row.\n  7388→        auto rowCount = getIntVal(fromTypeM->getRowCount());\n  7389→        auto colCount = getIntVal(fromTypeM->getColumnCount());\n  7390→\n  7391→        IRBuilder builder(m_irModule);\n  7392→        // Get from and to type of the row vector\n  7393→        auto fromTypeV = builder.getVectorType(fromTypeM->getElementType(), colCount);\n  7394→        auto toVectorV = builder.getVectorType(toTypeM->getElementType(), colCount);\n  7395→\n  7396→        List<SpvInst*> rowVectorsConverted;\n  7397→        // convert each row vector to toType.\n  7398→        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < rowCount; i++)\n  7399→        {\n  7400→            auto rowVector = emitOpCompositeExtract(\n  7401→                parent,\n  7402→                nullptr,\n  7403→                fromTypeV,\n  7404→                inst->getOperand(0),\n  7405→                makeArray(SpvLiteralInteger::from32(i)));\n  7406→\n  7407→            auto rowVectorConverted = emitOpFConvert(parent, nullptr, toVectorV, rowVector);\n  7408→            rowVectorsConverted.add(rowVectorConverted);\n  7409→        }\n  7410→\n  7411→        // construct a matrix from the converted row vectors.\n  7412→        return emitCompositeConstruct(parent, inst, toTypeM, rowVectorsConverted);\n  7413→    }\n  7414→\n  7415→    SpvInst* emitFloatCast(SpvInstParent* parent, IRFloatCast* inst)\n  7416→    {\n  7417→        const auto fromTypeV = inst->getOperand(0)->getDataType();\n  7418→        const auto toTypeV = inst->getDataType();\n  7419→\n  7420→        IRType* fromType = nullptr;\n  7421→        IRType* toType = nullptr;\n  7422→\n  7423→        bool isMatrixCast = false;\n  7424→        if (as<IRVectorType>(fromTypeV) || as<IRVectorType>(toTypeV) ||\n  7425→            as<IRCoopVectorType>(fromTypeV) || as<IRCoopVectorType>(toTypeV) ||\n  7426→            // Cooperative matrices behave like vectors where arithmetic operations can be performed\n  7427→            // directly without having to loop through the matrix and performing operations on the\n  7428→            // vectors.\n  7429→            as<IRCoopMatrixType>(fromTypeV) || as<IRCoopMatrixType>(toTypeV))\n  7430→        {\n  7431→            fromType = getVectorOrCoopMatrixElementType(fromTypeV);\n  7432→            toType = getVectorOrCoopMatrixElementType(toTypeV);\n  7433→        }\n  7434→        else if (as<IRMatrixType>(fromTypeV) || as<IRMatrixType>(toTypeV))\n  7435→        {\n  7436→            fromType = getMatrixElementType(fromTypeV);\n  7437→            toType = getMatrixElementType(toTypeV);\n  7438→            isMatrixCast = true;\n  7439→        }\n  7440→        else\n  7441→        {\n  7442→            fromType = fromTypeV;\n  7443→            toType = toTypeV;\n  7444→        }\n  7445→\n  7446→        // We'd better give some diagnostics to at least point out which line in the shader is\n  7447→        // wrong, so it can help the user or developers to locate the issue easier.\n  7448→        if (!isFloatingType(fromType))\n  7449→        {\n  7450→            m_sink->diagnose(inst, Diagnostics::internalCompilerError);\n  7451→        }\n  7452→\n  7453→        if (!isFloatingType(toType))\n  7454→        {\n  7455→            m_sink->diagnose(inst, Diagnostics::internalCompilerError);\n  7456→        }\n  7457→\n  7458→        SLANG_ASSERT(isFloatingType(fromType));\n  7459→        SLANG_ASSERT(isFloatingType(toType));\n  7460→        SLANG_ASSERT(!isTypeEqual(fromType, toType));\n  7461→\n  7462→        if (isMatrixCast)\n  7463→        {\n  7464→            return emitFloatCastForMatrix(\n  7465→                parent,\n  7466→                inst,\n  7467→                as<IRMatrixType>(fromTypeV),\n  7468→                as<IRMatrixType>(toTypeV));\n  7469→        }\n  7470→\n  7471→        return emitOpFConvert(parent, inst, toTypeV, inst->getOperand(0));\n  7472→    }\n  7473→\n  7474→    SpvInst* emitIntToFloatCast(SpvInstParent* parent, IRCastIntToFloat* inst)\n  7475→    {\n  7476→        const auto fromTypeV = inst->getOperand(0)->getDataType();\n  7477→        const auto toTypeV = inst->getDataType();\n  7478→        SLANG_ASSERT(!as<IRVectorType>(fromTypeV) == !as<IRVectorType>(toTypeV));\n  7479→        const auto fromType = getVectorOrCoopMatrixElementType(fromTypeV);\n  7480→        const auto toType = getVectorOrCoopMatrixElementType(toTypeV);\n  7481→\n  7482→        SLANG_ASSERT(isFloatingType(toType));\n  7483→\n  7484→        if (isIntegralType(fromType))\n type\");\n  7516→        }\n  7517→    }\n  7518→\n  7519→    SpvInst* emitFloatToIntCast(SpvInstParent* parent, IRCastFloatToInt* inst)\n  7520→    {\n  7521→        const auto fromTypeV =   inst->getOperand(0));\n  7606→    }\n  7607→\n  7608→    SpvInst* emitBitfieldExtract(SpvInstParent* parent, IRInst* inst)\n  7609→    {\n  7610→        auto dataType = inst->getDataType();\n  7611→        IRVectorType* vectorType = as<IRVectorType>(dataType);\n  7612→        Slang::IRType* elementType = dataType;\n  7613→        if (vectorType)\n  7614→            elementType = vectorType->getElementType();\n  7615→\n  7616→        const IntInfo i = getIntTypeInfo(elementType);\n  7617→\n  7618→        // NM: technically, using bitfield intrinsics for anything non-32-bit goes against\n  7619→        // VK specification: VUID-StandaloneSpirv-Base-04781. However, it works on at least\n  7620→        // NVIDIA HW.\n  7621→        SpvOp opcode = i.isSigned ? SpvOpBitFieldSExtract : SpvOpBitFieldUExtract;\n  7622→        return emitInst(\n  7623→            parent,\n  7624→            inst,\n  7625→            opcode,\n  7626→            inst->getFullType(),\n  7627→            kResultID,\n  7628→            inst->getOperand(0),\n  7629→            inst->getOperand(1),\n  7630→            inst->getOperand(2));\n  7631→    }\n  7632→\n  7633→    SpvInst* emitBitfieldInsert(SpvInstParent* parent, IRInst* inst)\n  7634→    {\n  7635→        auto dataType = inst->getDataType();\n  7636→        IRVectorType* vectorType = as<IRVectorType>(dataType);\n  7637→        Slang::IRType* elementType = dataType;\n  7638→        if (vectorType)\n  7639→            elementType = vectorType->getElementType();\n  7640→\n  7641→        const IntInfo i = getIntTypeInfo(elementType);\n  7642→\n  7643→        if (i.width == 64)\n  7644→            requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityInt64);\n  7645→        if (i.width == 16)\n SpvExecutionModeDenormFlushToZero,\n  5159→                    SpvLiteralInteger::from32(width));\n  5160→            }\n  5161→            break;\n  5162→        case  5172→                    decoration,\n  5173→                    dstID,\n  5174→                    SpvExecutionModeInvocations,\n  5175→                    SpvLiteralInteger::from32(count));\n  5176→            }\n  5177→            break;\n  5178→        case kIROp_TriangleInputPrimitiveTypeDecoration:\n  5179→        case kIROp_LineInputPrimitiveTypeDecoration:\n  5180→        case kIROp_LineAdjInputPrimitiveTypeDecoration:\n  5181→        case kIROp_PointInputPrimitiveTypeDecoration:\n  5182→        case kIROp_TriangleAdjInputPrimitiveTypeDecoration:\n  5183→            // kIROp_StreamOutputTypeDecoration:\n  5187→            {\n  5188→                for (auto inputDecor : decoration->getParent()->getDecorations())\n  5189→                {\n  5190→                 requireSPIRVExecutionMode(inputDecor, dstID, SpvExecutionModeInputLines);\n  5197→                        break;\n  5198→                    case                requireSPIRVExecutionMode(inputDecor, dstID, SpvExecutionModeInputPoints);\n  5206→                        break;\n  5207→                    case     break;\n  5249→        case kIROp_MaximallyReconvergesDecoration:\n  5250→            ensureExtensionDeclaration(UnownedStringSlice(\"SPV_KHR_maximal_reconvergence\"));\n  5251→               getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5276→                    decoration,\n  5277→                    dstID,\n  5278→                    SpvDecorationBlock);\n  5279→                SpvExecutionMode m = SpvExecutionModeMax;\n  5305→                if (entryPointDecor)\n  5306→                {\n  5307→                    switch                         m = SpvExecutionModePointMode;\n  5317→                        break;\n  5318→                    }\n  5319→                }\n  5320→                if (m == SpvExecutionModeMax)\n  5321→                {\n  5322→                    if (topologyType == OutputTopologyType::Triangle)\n  5323→                        m = SpvExecutionModeOutputTrianglesEXT;\n  5324→                    else if (topologyType == OutputTopologyType::Line)\n  5325→                        m = SpvExecutionModeOutputLinesEXT;\n  5326→                    else if (topologyType ==                requireSPIRVExecutionMode(decoration, dstID, m);\n  5332→            }\n  5333→            break;\n  5334→\n  5335→        case kIROp_VerticesDecoration:\n  5336→            {\n  5337→ 5403→                if (!domainName)\n  5404→                    break;\n  5405→                auto domainStr = domainName->getStringSlice();\n  5406→                if 5414→            }\n  5415→            break;\n  5416→        case kIROp_MemoryQualifierSetDecoration:\n  5417→            {\n  5418→                auto collection = https://github.khronos.org/SPIRV-Registry/extensions/KHR/SPV_KHR_vulkan_memory_model.html#_modifications_to_the_spir_v_specification_version_1_3\n  5422→                // \"Coherent is not allowed                      SpvDecorationCoherent);\n  5433→                    }\n  5434→                    if (flags & MemoryQualifierSetModifier::Flags::kVolatile)\n  5435→                    {\n  5436→                        emitOpDecorate(\n  5437→                            getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5438→                            nullptr,\n  5439→                            dstID,\n  5440→                            SpvDecorationVolatile);\n  5441→                    }\n  5442→                }\n  5443→                if (flags & 5468→            }\n  5469→        case kIROp_DownstreamModuleExportDecoration:\n  5470→            {\n  5471→                requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityLinkage);\n  5472→                auto getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5476→                    decoration,\n  5477→                    SpvOpDecorate,\n  5478→                    dstID,\n  5479→                 decoration,\n  5492→                    SpvOpDecorate,\n  5493→                    dstID,\n  5494→                    SpvDecorationLinkageAttributes,\n  5495→                    name,\n  5496→                    SpvLinkageTypeImport);\n  5497→                break;\n  5498→            }\n  5499→            // ...\n  5500→        }\n  5501→\n  5502→        if (isRayTracingObject)\n  5503→        {\n  5504→            if (decoration->getOperandCount() > 0)\n  5505→            {\n  5506→                // if not greater than 0, this is not a layout decoration (no val)\n  5507→                emitOpDecorateLocation(\n  5508→                    getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5509→                    decoration,\n  5510→                    dstID,\n  5511→                    SpvLiteralInteger::from32(int32_t(getIntVal(decoration->getOperand(0)))));\n  5512→            }\n  5513→        }\n  5514→\n  5515→        if (shouldEmitSPIRVReflectionInfo())\n  5516→        {\n  5517→            switch (decoration->getOp())\n  5518→            {\n  5519→            default:\n  5520→                break;\n  5521→            case kIROp_SemanticDecoration:\n  5522→                {\n  5523→                    ensureExtensionDeclarationBeforeSpv14(\n  5524→                        toSlice(\"SPV_GOOGLE_hlsl_functionality1\"));\n  5525→                    emitOpDecorateString(\n  5526→                        getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5527→                        decoration,\n  5528→                        dstID,\n  5529→                        SpvDecorationUserSemantic,\n  5530→ toSlice(\"SPV_GOOGLE_hlsl_functionality1\"));\n  5538→                    emitOpDecorateString(\n  5539→                        getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5540→         }\n  5559→        }\n  5560→    }\n  5561→\n  5562→    bool isPhysicalCompositeType(IRType* type)\n  5563→    {\n  5564→        for (auto decor : type->getDecorations())\n  5565→        {\n  5566→            switch (decor->getOp())\n  5567→            {\n  5568→            case kIROp_PhysicalTypeDecoration:\n  5569→            case kIROp_SPIRVBlockDecoration:\n  5570→            case kIROp_SPIRVBufferBlockDecoration:\n  5571→                return true;\n  5572→            }\n  5573→        }\n  5574→        return false;\n  5575→    }\n  5576→\n  5577→    void emitLayoutDecorations(IRStructType* structType, SpvWord spvStructID)\n  5578→    {\n  5579→        /*****\n  5580→         * SPIRV Spec:\n  5581→         * Each structure-type member must have an Offset decoration.\n  5582→         *\n  5583→         * Each array type must have an ArrayStride decoration, unless it is an\n  5584→         * array that contains a structure decorated with Block or BufferBlock, in\n  5585→         * which case it must not have an ArrayStride decoration.\n  5586→         *\n  5587→         * Each structure-type member that is a matrix or array-of-matrices must be\n  5588→         * decorated with a MatrixStride Decoration, and one of the RowMajor or\n  5589→         * ColMajor decorations.\n  5590→         *\n  5591→         * The ArrayStride, MatrixStride, and Offset decorations must be large\n  5592→         * enough to hold the size of the objects they affect (that is, specifying\n  5593→         * overlap is invalid). Each ArrayStride and MatrixStride must be greater\n  5594→         * than zero, and it is invalid for two members of a given structure to be\n  5595→         * assigned the same Offset.\n  5596→         *\n  5597→         *****/\n  5598→        auto layout = structType->findDecoration<IRSizeAndAlignmentDecoration>();\n  5599→        IRTypeLayoutRuleName layoutRuleName = IRTypeLayoutRuleName::Natural;\n  5600→        if (layout)\n  5601→        {\n  5602→            layoutRuleName = layout->getLayoutName();\n  5603→        }\n  5604→        int32_t id = 0;\n  5605→        bool isPhysicalType = isPhysicalCompositeType(structType);\n  5606→        for (auto field : structType->getFields())\n  5607→        {\n  5608→            for (auto decor : field->getKey()->getDecorations())\n  5609→            {\n  5610→                if (auto fieldNameDecor = as<IRNameHintDecoration>(decor))\n  5611→                {\n  5612→                    emitOpMemberName(\n  5613→                        getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::DebugNames),\n  5614→                        nullptr,\n  5615→                        spvStructID,\n  5616→                        id,\n  5617→                        fieldNameDecor->getName());\n  5618→                }\n  5619→                else if (auto collection = as<IRMemoryQualifierSetDecoration>(decor))\n  5620→                {\n  5621→                    IRIntegerValue flags = collection->getMemoryQualifierBit();\n  5622→                    // https://github.khronos.org/SPIRV-Registry/extensions/KHR/SPV_KHR_vulkan_memory_model.html#_modifications_to_the_spir_v_specification_version_1_3\n  5623→                    // \"Coherent is not allowed when the declared memory model is VulkanKHR.\"\n  5624→                    // \"Volatile is not allowed when the declared memory model is VulkanKHR\"\n  5625→                    if (m_memoryModel != SpvMemoryModelVulkan)\n  5626→                    {\n  5627→                        if (flags & MemoryQualifierSetModifier::Flags::kCoherent)\n  5628→                        {\n  5629→                            emitOpMemberDecorate(\n  5630→                                getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5631→                                nullptr,\n  5632→                                spvStructID,\n  5633→                                SpvLiteralInteger::from32(id),\n  5634→                                SpvDecorationCoherent);\n  5635→                        }\n  5636→                        if (flags & MemoryQualifierSetModifier::Flags::kVolatile)\n  5637→                        {\n  5638→                            emitOpMemberDecorate(\n  5639→                                getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5640→                                nullptr,\n  5641→                                spvStructID,\n  5642→                                SpvLiteralInteger::from32(id),\n  5643→                                SpvDecorationVolatile);\n  5644→                        }\n  5645→                    }\n  5646→                    if (flags & MemoryQualifierSetModifier::Flags::kRestrict)\n  5647→                    {\n  5648→                        emitOpMemberDecorate(\n  5649→                            getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5650→                            nullptr,\n  5651→                            spvStructID,\n  5652→                            SpvLiteralInteger::from32(id),\n  5653→                            SpvDecorationRestrict);\n  5654→                    }\n  5655→                    if (flags & MemoryQualifierSetModifier::Flags::kReadOnly)\n  5656→                    {\n  5657→                        emitOpMemberDecorate(\n  5658→                            getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5659→                            nullptr,\n  5660→                            spvStructID,\n  5661→                            SpvLiteralInteger::from32(id),\n  5662→                            SpvDecorationNonWritable);\n  5663→                    }\n  5664→                    if (flags & MemoryQualifierSetModifier::Flags::kWriteOnly)\n  5665→                    {\n  5666→                        emitOpMemberDecorate(\n  5667→                            getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5668→                            nullptr,\n  5669→                            spvStructID,\n  5670→                            SpvLiteralInteger::from32(id),\n  5671→                            SpvDecorationNonReadable);\n  5672→                    }\n  5673→                }\n  5674→                else if (\n  5675→                    auto semanticDecor = field->getKey()->findDecoration<IRSemanticDecoration>())\n  5676→                {\n  5677→                    if (shouldEmitSPIRVReflectionInfo())\n  5678→                    {\n  5679→                        ensureExtensionDeclarationBeforeSpv14(\n  5680→                            toSlice(\"SPV_GOOGLE_hlsl_functionality1\"));\n  5681→                        emitOpMemberDecorateString(\n  5682→                            getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5683→                            nullptr,\n  5684→                            spvStructID,\n  5685→                            SpvLiteralInteger::from32(id),\n  5686→                            SpvDecorationUserSemantic,\n  5687→                            semanticDecor->getSemanticName());\n  5688→                    }\n  5689→                }\n  5690→            }\n  5691→\n  5692→            if (!isPhysicalType)\n  5693→                continue;\n  5694→\n  5695→            // Emit explicit struct field layout decorations if the struct is physical.\n  5696→            IRIntegerValue offset = 0;\n  5697→            if (auto offsetDecor = field->getKey()->findDecoration<IRPackOffsetDecoration>())\n  5698→            {\n  5699→                offset = (getIntVal(offsetDecor->getRegisterOffset()) * 4 +\n  5700→                          getIntVal(offsetDecor->getComponentOffset())) *\n  5701→                         4;\n  5702→            }\n  5703→            else\n  5704→            {\n  5705→                getOffset(\n  5706→                    m_targetProgram->getOptionSet(),\n  5707→                    IRTypeLayoutRules::get(layoutRuleName),\n  5708→                    field,\n  5709→                    &offset);\n  5710→            }\n  5711→            emitOpMemberDecorateOffset(\n  5712→                getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5713→                nullptr,\n  5714→                spvStructID,\n  5715→                SpvLiteralInteger::from32(id),\n  5716→                SpvLiteralInteger::from32(int32_t(offset)));\n  5717→            auto matrixType = as<IRMatrixType>(field->getFieldType());\n  5718→            auto arrayType = as<IRArrayTypeBase>(field->getFieldType());\n  5719→            if (!matrixType && arrayType)\n  5720→            {\n  5721→                matrixType = as<IRMatrixType>(arrayType->getElementType());\n  5722→            }\n  5723→            if (matrixType)\n  5724→            {\n  5725→                // SPIRV sepc on MatrixStride:\n  5726→                // Applies only to a member of a structure type. Only valid on a\n  5727→                // matrix or array whose most basic element is a matrix. Matrix\n  5728→                // Stride is an unsigned 32 - bit integer specifying the stride\n  5729→                // of the rows in a RowMajor - decorated matrix or columns in a\n  5730→                // ColMajor - decorated matrix.\n  5731→                IRIntegerValue matrixStride = 0;\n  5732→                auto rule = IRTypeLayoutRules::get(layoutRuleName);\n  5733→                IRSizeAndAlignment elementSizeAlignment;\n  5734→                getSizeAndAlignment(\n  5735→                    m_targetProgram->getOptionSet(),\n  5736→                    rule,\n  5737→                    matrixType->getElementType(),\n  5738→                    &elementSizeAlignment);\n  5739→                IRIntegerValue matrixMinorVectorCount = 0;\n  5740→                // Reminder: the meaning of row/column major layout\n  5741→                // in our semantics is the *opposite* of what GLSL/SPIRV\n  5742→                // calls them, because what they call \"columns\"\n  5743→                // are what we call \"rows.\"\n  5744→                //\n  5745→                if (getIntVal(matrixType->getLayout()) == SLANG_MATRIX_LAYOUT_COLUMN_MAJOR)\n  5746→                {\n  5747→                    emitOpMemberDecorate(\n  5748→                        getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5749→                        nullptr,\n  5750→                        spvStructID,\n  5751→                        SpvLiteralInteger::from32(id),\n  5752→                        SpvDecorationRowMajor);\n  5753→                    matrixMinorVectorCount = getIntVal(matrixType->getRowCount());\n  5754→                }\n  5755→                else\n  5756→                {\n  5757→                    emitOpMemberDecorate(\n  5758→                        getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5759→                        nullptr,\n  5760→                        spvStructID,\n  5761→                        SpvLiteralInteger::from32(id),\n  5762→                        SpvDecorationColMajor);\n  5763→                    matrixMinorVectorCount = getIntVal(matrixType->getColumnCount());\n  5764→                }\n  5765→\n  5766→                // We need the size of our vector. To get the stride we need to know how 'big'\n  5767→                // each vector element is inside an array, due to this we align our vector\n  5768→                // as if a composite.\n  5769→                auto vectorSize =\n  5770→                    rule->getVectorSizeAndAlignment(elementSizeAlignment, matrixMinorVectorCount);\n  5771→                vectorSize = rule->alignCompositeElement(vectorSize);\n  5772→                matrixStride = vectorSize.getStride();\n  5773→                emitOpMemberDecorateMatrixStride(\n  5774→                    getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5775→                    nullptr,\n  5776→                    spvStructID,\n  5777→                    SpvLiteralInteger::from32(id),\n  5778→                    SpvLiteralInteger::from32((int32_t)matrixStride));\n  5779→            }\n  5780→            id++;\n  5781→        }\n  5782→    }\n  5783→\n  5784→    /// Map a Slang `Stage` to a corresponding SPIR-V execution model\n  5785→    SpvExecutionModel mapStageToExecutionModel(Stage stage)\n  5786→    {\n  5787→        switch (stage)\n  5788→        {\n  5789→        default:\n  5790→            SLANG_UNEXPECTED(\"unhandled stage\");\n  5791→            UNREACHABLE_RETURN((SpvExecutionModel)0);\n  5792→\n  5793→#define CASE(STAGE, MODEL) \\\n  5794→    case Stage::STAGE:     \\\n  5795→        return SpvExecutionModel##MODEL\n  5796→\n  5797→            CASE(Vertex, Vertex);\n  5798→            CASE(Hull, TessellationControl);\n  5799→            CASE(Domain, TessellationEvaluation);\n  5800→            CASE(Geometry, Geometry);\n  5801→            CASE(Fragment, Fragment);\n  5802→            CASE(Compute, GLCompute);\n  5803→            CASE(Mesh, MeshEXT);\n  5804→            CASE(Amplification, TaskEXT);\n  5805→            CASE(ClosestHit, ClosestHitKHR);\n  5806→            CASE(AnyHit, AnyHitKHR);\n  5807→            CASE(Callable, CallableKHR);\n  5808→            CASE(Miss, MissKHR);\n  5809→            CASE(Intersection, IntersectionKHR);\n  5810→            CASE(RayGeneration, RayGenerationKHR);\n  5811→            // TODO: Extended execution models for ray tracing, etc.\n  5812→\n  5813→#undef CASE\n  5814→        }\n  5815→    }\n  5816→\n  5817→    struct BuiltinSpvVarKey\n  5818→    {\n  5819→        SpvBuiltIn builtinName;\n  5820→        SpvStorageClass storageClass = SpvStorageClassInput;\n  5821→        bool flat = false;\n  5822→        BuiltinSpvVarKey() = default;\n  5823→        BuiltinSpvVarKey(SpvBuiltIn builtin, SpvStorageClass storageClass, bool isFlat)\n  5824→            : builtinName(builtin), storageClass(storageClass), flat(isFlat)\n  5825→        {\n  5826→        }\n  5827→        bool operator==(const BuiltinSpvVarKey& other) const\n  5828→        {\n  5829→            return builtinName == other.builtinName && storageClass == other.storageClass &&\n  5830→                   flat == other.flat;\n  5831→        }\n  5832→        HashCode getHashCode() const\n  5833→        {\n  5834→            return combineHash(\n  5835→                Slang::getHashCode(builtinName),\n  5836→                Slang::getHashCode(storageClass),\n  5837→                Slang::getHashCode(flat));\n  5838→        }\n  5839→    };\n  5840→    Dictionary<BuiltinSpvVarKey, SpvInst*> m_builtinGlobalVars;\n  5841→\n  5842→\n  5843→    bool isInstUsedInStage(IRInst* inst, Stage s)\n  5844→    {\n  5845→        auto* referencingEntryPoints = m_referencingEntryPoints.tryGetValue(inst);\n  5846→        if (!referencingEntryPoints)\n  5847→            return false;\n  5848→        for (auto entryPoint : *referencingEntryPoints)\n  5849→        {\n  5850→            if (auto entryPointDecor = entryPoint->findDecoration<IREntryPointDecoration>())\n  5851→            {\n  5852→                if (entryPointDecor->getProfile().getStage() == s)\n  5853→                    return true;\n  5854→            }\n  5855→        }\n  5856→        return false;\n  5857→    }\n  5858→\n  5859→    bool needFlatDecorationForBuiltinVar(IRInst* irInst)\n  5860→    {\n  5861→        if (!irInst)\n  5862→            return false;\n  5863→        if (irInst->getOp() != kIROp_GlobalVar && irInst->getOp() != kIROp_GlobalParam)\n  5864→            return false;\n  5865→        auto ptrType = as<IRPtrType>(irInst->getDataType());\n  5866→        if (!ptrType)\n  5867→            return false;\n  5868→        auto addrSpace = ptrType->getAddressSpace();\n  5869→        if (addrSpace == AddressSpace::Input || addrSpace == AddressSpace::BuiltinInput)\n  5870→        {\n  5871→            if (isIntegralScalarOrCompositeType(ptrType->getValueType()))\n  5872→            {\n  5873→                if (isInstUsedInStage(irInst, Stage::Fragment))\n  5874→                    return true;\n  5875→            }\n  5876→        }\n  5877→        return false;\n  5878→    }\n  5879→\n  5880→    SpvInst* getBuiltinGlobalVar(IRType* type, SpvBuiltIn builtinVal, IRInst* irInst)\n  5881→    {\n  5882→        SpvInst* result = nullptr;\n  5883→        auto ptrType = as<IRPtrTypeBase>(type);\n  5884→        SLANG_ASSERT(ptrType && \"`getBuiltinGlobalVar`: `type` must be ptr type.\");\n  5885→        auto storageClass = addressSpaceToStorageClass(ptrType->getAddressSpace());\n  5886→        bool isFlat = needFlatDecorationForBuiltinVar(irInst);\n  5887→        auto key = BuiltinSpvVarKey(builtinVal, storageClass, isFlat);\n  5888→        if (m_builtinGlobalVars.tryGetValue(key, result))\n  5889→        {\n  5890→            return result;\n  5891→        }\n  5892→        IRBuilder builder(m_irModule);\n  5893→        builder.setInsertBefore(type);\n  5894→        auto varInst = emitOpVariable(\n  5895→            getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::GlobalVariables),\n  5896→            nullptr,\n  5897→            type,\n  5898→            addressSpaceToStorageClass(ptrType->getAddressSpace()));\n  5899→        emitOpDecorateBuiltIn(\n  5900→            getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5901→            nullptr,\n  5902→            varInst,\n  5903→            builtinVal);\n  5904→        switch (builtinVal)\n  5905→        {\n  5906→        case SpvBuiltInTessLevelInner:\n  5907→        case SpvBuiltInTessLevelOuter:\n  5908→            emitOpDecorate(\n  5909→                getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  5910→                nullptr,\n  5911→                varInst,\n  5912→                SpvDecorationPatch);\n  5913→            break;\n  5914→        }\n  5915→        m_builtinGlobalVars[key] = varInst;\n  5916→\n  5917→        if (isFlat)\n  5918→        {\n  5919→            _maybeEmitInterpolationModifierDecoration(\n  5920→                IRInterpolationMode::NoInterpolation,\n  5921→                getID(varInst));\n  5922→        }\n  5923→\n  5924→        return varInst;\n  5925→    }\n  5926→\n  5927→    SpvInst* maybeEmitSystemVal(IRInst* inst)\n  5928→    {\n  5929→        IRBuilder builder(m_irModule);\n  5930→        builder.setInsertBefore(inst);\n  5931→        if (auto builtinVarDecor = inst->findDecoration<IRTargetBuiltinVarDecoration>())\n  5932→        {\n  5933→            switch (builtinVarDecor->getBuiltinVarName())\n  5934→            {\n  5935→            case IRTargetBuiltinVarName::SpvInstanceIndex:\n  5936→                return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInInstanceIndex, inst);\n  5937→            case IRTargetBuiltinVarName::SpvBaseInstance:\n  5938→                requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityDrawParameters);\n  5939→                return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInBaseInstance, inst);\n  5940→            case IRTargetBuiltinVarName::SpvVertexIndex:\n  5941→                return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInVertexIndex, inst);\n  5942→            case IRTargetBuiltinVarName::SpvBaseVertex:\n  5943→                requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityDrawParameters);\n  5944→                return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInBaseVertex, inst);\n  5945→            }\n  5946→        }\n  5947→        if (auto layout = getVarLayout(inst))\n  5948→        {\n  5949→            if (auto systemValueAttr = layout->findAttr<IRSystemValueSemanticAttr>())\n  5950→            {\n  5951→                String semanticName = systemValueAttr->getName();\n  5952→                semanticName = semanticName.toLower();\n  5953→                if (semanticName == \"sv_position\")\n  5954→                {\n  5955→                    auto importDecor = inst->findDecoration<IRImportDecoration>();\n  5956→                    if (importDecor->getMangledName() == \"gl_FragCoord\")\n  5957→                        return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInFragCoord, inst);\n  5958→                    else\n  5959→                        return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInPosition, inst);\n  5960→                }\n  5961→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_target\")\n  5962→                {\n  5963→                    // Note: we do *not* need to generate some kind of `gl_`\n  5964→                    // builtin for fragment-shader outputs: they are just\n  5965→                    // ordinary `out` variables, with ordinary `location`s,\n  5966→                    // as far as GLSL is concerned.\n  5967→                    return nullptr;\n  5968→                }\n  5969→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_clipdistance\")\n  5970→                {\n  5971→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInClipDistance, inst);\n  5972→                }\n  5973→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_culldistance\")\n  5974→                {\n  5975→                    requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityCullDistance);\n  5976→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInCullDistance, inst);\n  5977→                }\n  5978→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_coverage\")\n  5979→                {\n  5980→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInSampleMask, inst);\n  5981→                }\n  5982→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_innercoverage\")\n  5983→                {\n  5984→                    requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityFragmentFullyCoveredEXT);\n  5985→                    ensureExtensionDeclaration(\n  5986→                        UnownedStringSlice(\"SPV_EXT_fragment_fully_covered\"));\n  5987→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(\n  5988→                        inst->getFullType(),\n  5989→                        SpvBuiltInFullyCoveredEXT,\n  5990→                        inst);\n  5991→                }\n  5992→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_depth\")\n  5993→                {\n  5994→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInFragDepth, inst);\n  5995→                }\n  5996→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_depthgreaterequal\")\n  5997→                {\n  5998→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInFragDepth, inst);\n  5999→                }\n  6000→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_depthlessequal\")\n  6001→                {\n  6002→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInFragDepth, inst);\n  6003→                }\n  6004→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_dispatchthreadid\")\n  6005→                {\n  6006→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(\n  6007→                        inst->getFullType(),\n  6008→                        SpvBuiltInGlobalInvocationId,\n  6009→                        inst);\n  6010→                }\n  6011→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_domainlocation\")\n  6012→                {\n  6013→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInTessCoord, inst);\n  6014→                }\n  6015→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_groupid\")\n  6016→                {\n  6017→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInWorkgroupId, inst);\n  6018→                }\n  6019→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_groupindex\")\n  6020→                {\n  6021→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(\n  6022→                        inst->getFullType(),\n  6023→                        SpvBuiltInLocalInvocationIndex,\n  6024→                        inst);\n  6025→                }\n  6026→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_groupthreadid\")\n  6027→                {\n  6028→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(\n  6029→                        inst->getFullType(),\n  6030→                        SpvBuiltInLocalInvocationId,\n  6031→                        inst);\n  6032→                }\n  6033→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_gsinstanceid\")\n  6034→                {\n  6035→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInInvocationId, inst);\n  6036→                }\n  6037→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_vulkaninstanceid\")\n  6038→                {\n  6039→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInInstanceIndex, inst);\n  6040→                }\n  6041→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_baseinstanceid\")\n  6042→                {\n  6043→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInBaseInstance, inst);\n  6044→                }\n  6045→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_isfrontface\")\n  6046→                {\n  6047→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInFrontFacing, inst);\n  6048→                }\n  6049→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_outputcontrolpointid\")\n  6050→                {\n  6051→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInInvocationId, inst);\n  6052→                }\n  6053→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_pointsize\")\n  6054→                {\n  6055→                    // float in hlsl & glsl\n  6056→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInPointSize, inst);\n  6057→                }\n  6058→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_pointcoord\")\n  6059→                {\n  6060→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInPointCoord, inst);\n  6061→                }\n  6062→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_drawindex\")\n  6063→                {\n  6064→                    requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityDrawParameters);\n  6065→                    return                  ensureExtensionDeclaration(UnownedStringSlice(\"SPV_KHR_device_group\"));\n  6070→                    requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityDeviceGroup);\n  6071→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInDeviceIndex, inst);\n  6072→                }\n  6073→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_primitiveid\")\n  6074→                {\n  6075→                    auto entryPoints = m_referencingEntryPoints.tryGetValue(inst);\n  6076→                    // SPIRV requires `Geometry` capability being declared for a fragment\n  6077→                    // shader, if that shader uses sv_primitiveid.\n  6078→                    // We will check if this builtin is used by non-ray-tracing, non-geometry or\n  6079→                    // non-tessellation shader stages, and if so include a declaration of\n  6080→                    // Geometry capability.\n  6081→                    bool needGeometryCapability = true;\n  6082→                    if (entryPoints)\n  6083→                    {\n  6084→                        for (auto entryPoint : *entryPoints)\n  6085→                        {\n  6086→                            if 6099→                                    needGeometryCapability = false;\n  6100→                                    break;\n  6101→                                }\n  6102→                            }\n  6103→                        }\n  6104→                    }\n  6105→                    if (needGeometryCapability)\n  6106→                        requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityGeometry);\n  6107→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInPrimitiveId, inst);\n  6108→                }\n  6109→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_rendertargetarrayindex\")\n  6110→                {\n  6111→                    if (isSpirv14OrLater())\n  6112→                        requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityShaderLayer);\n  6113→                    else\n  6114→                        requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityGeometry);\n  6115→                    return              requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilitySampleRateShading);\n  6120→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInSampleId, inst);\n  6121→                }\n  6122→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_stencilref\")\n  6123→                {\n  6124→                    requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityStencilExportEXT);\n  6125→ 6128→                        SpvBuiltInFragStencilRefEXT,\n  6129→                        inst);\n  6130→                }\n  6131→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_tessfactor\")\n  6132→                {\n  6133→                    requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityTessellation);\n  6134→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInTessLevelOuter, inst);\n  6135→                }\n  6136→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_insidetessfactor\")\n  6137→                {\n  6138→                    requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityTessellation);\n  6139→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInTessLevelInner, inst);\n  6140→                }\n  6141→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_vulkanvertexid\")\n  6142→                {\n  6143→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInVertexIndex, inst);\n  6144→                }\n  6145→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_viewid\")\n  6146→                {\n  6147→                    requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityMultiView);\n  6148→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInViewIndex, inst);\n  6149→                }\n  6150→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_viewportarrayindex\")\n  6151→                {\n  6152→                    requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityShaderViewportIndex);\n  6153→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInViewportIndex,                ensureExtensionDeclaration(\n  6172→                        UnownedStringSlice(\"SPV_KHR_fragment_shader_barycentric\"));\n  6173→                    return getBuiltinGlobalVar(inst->getFullType(), SpvBuiltInBaryCoordKHR, inst);\n  6174→\n  6175→                    // TODO: There is also the `gl_BaryCoordNoPerspNV` builtin, which\n  6176→                    // we ought to use if the `noperspective` modifier has been\n  6177→                    // applied to this varying input.\n  6178→                }\n  6179→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_cullprimitive\")\n  6180→                {\n  6181→                    requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityMeshShadingEXT);\n  6182→              SpvBuiltInCullPrimitiveEXT,\n  6186→                        inst);\n  6187→                }\n  6188→                else if (semanticName == \"sv_shadingrate\")\n  6189→                {\n  6190→                    requireSPIRVCapability(SpvCapabilityFragmentShadingRateKHR);\n  6191→                    ensureExtensionDeclaration(UnownedStringSlice(\"SPV_KHR_fragment_shading_rate\"));\n  6192→                    auto importDecor = inst->findDecoration<IRImportDecoration>();\n  6193→             inst->getFullType(),\n  6197→                            SpvBuiltInPrimitiveShadingRateKHR,\n  6198→                            inst);\n  6199→                    else\n  6200→                        return getBuiltinGlobalVar(\n  6201→                            inst->getFullType(),\n  6202→                            SpvBuiltInShadingRateKHR,\n  6203→ 6216→            }\n  6217→        }\n  6218→\n  6219→        //\n  6220→        // These are system-value variables which require redeclaration in\n  6221→        // GLSL, SPIR-V makes no such maybeEmitPointerDecoration(SpvInst* varInst, IRType* type, bool isVar, IROp op)\n  6248→    {\n  6249→        auto ptrType = as<IRPtrType>(unwrapArray(type));\n  6250→        if (!ptrType)\n  6251→            return;\n  6252→        if (addressSpaceToStorageClass(ptrType->getAddressSpace()) ==\n  6253→            SpvStorageClassPhysicalStorageBuffer)\n  6254→        {\n  6255→            // If inst getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::Annotations),\n  6259→                nullptr,\n  6260→                varInst,\n  6261→                (isVar ? SpvDecorationAliasedPointer\n  6279→                         : SpvDecorationAliased));\n  6280→            }\n  6281→        }\n  6282→    }\n  6283→\n  6284→    void maybeEmitPointerDecoration(SpvInst* varInst, IRInst* inst)\n  6285→    {\n  6286→        maybeEmitPointerDecoration(varInst, inst->getDataType(), as<IRVar>(inst), inst->getOp());\n  6287→    }\n  6288→\n  6289→    void maybeEmitWriteOnlyImageDecoration(SpvInst* varInst, IRInst* inst)\n  6290→    {\n  6291→        auto ptrType = as<IRPtrTypeBase>(inst->getDataType());\n  6292→        if    auto ptrType = as<IRPtrTypeBase>(inst->getDataType());\n  6319→        SLANG_ASSERT(ptrType);\n  6320→        SpvStorageClass storageClass = getSpvStorageClass(ptrType);\n  6321→\n  6322→ 6325→        return varSpvInst;\n  6326→    }\n  6327→\n  6328→    /// Cached `IRParam` indices in an `IRBlock`. For use in `getParamIndexInBlock`.\n  6329→    struct BlockParamIndexInfo : public RefObject\n  6330→    {\n  6331→        Dictionary<IRParam*, int> mapParamToIndex;\n  6332→    };\n  6333→    Dictionary<IRBlock*, RefPtr<BlockParamIndexInfo>> m_mapIRBlockToParamIndexInfo;\n  6334→\n  6335→    /// Returns the index of an `IRParam` inside a `IRBlock`.\n  6336→    /// The results are cached in `m_mapIRBlockToParamIndexInfo` to avoid linear search.\n  6337→    int getParamIndexInBlock(IRBlock* block, IRParam* paramInst)\n  6338→    {\n  6339→        RefPtr<BlockParamIndexInfo> info;\n  6340→        int result = -1;\n  6341→        if (m_mapIRBlockToParamIndexInfo.tryGetValue(block, info))\n  6342→        {\n  6343→            info->mapParamToIndex.tryGetValue(paramInst, result);\n  6344→            SLANG_ASSERT(result != -1);\n  6345→            return result;\n  6346→        }\n  6347→        info = new BlockParamIndexInfo();\n  6348→        int paramIndex = 0;\n  6349→        for (auto param : block->getParams())\n  6350→        {\n  6351→            info->mapParamToIndex[param] = paramIndex;\n  6352→            if (param == paramInst)\n  6353→                result = paramIndex;\n  6354→            paramIndex++;\n  6355→        }\n  6356→        m_mapIRBlockToParamIndexInfo[block] = info;\n  6357→        SLANG_ASSERT(result != -1);\n  6358→        return result;\n  6359→    }\n  6360→\n  6361→    bool isGlobalValueInst(IRInst* inst)\n  6362→    {\n  6363→        if (as<IRConstant>(inst))\n  6364→            return true;\n  6365→        switch (inst->getOp())\n  6366→        {\n  6367→        case kIROp_Func:\n  6368→        case kIROp_GlobalParam:\n  6369→        case kIROp_GlobalVar:\n  6370→            return true;\n  6371→        default:\n  6372→            return false;\n  6373→        }\n  6374→    }\n  6375→\n  6376→    void emitLoopHeaderBlock(IRLoop* loopInst, SpvInst* loopHeaderBlock)\n  6377→    {\n  6378→        bool hasBackJump = false;\n  6379→        for (auto use = loopInst->getTargetBlock()->firstUse; use; use = use->nextUse)\n  6380→        {\n  6381→            if (use->getUser() == loopInst)\n  6382→                continue;\n  6383→            hasBackJump = true;\n  6384→            break;\n  6385→        }\n  6386→        if (!hasBackJump)\n  6387→        {\n  6388→            // If the loop does not have a back jump, it is used as a breakable region.\n  6389→            // SPIRV does not allow loops without a back jump, so we are going to emit\n  6390→            // a switch instead.\n  6391→            IRBuilder builder(loopInst);\n  6392→            builder.setInsertBefore(loopInst);\n  6393→            emitOpSelectionMerge(\n  6394→                loopHeaderBlock,\n  6395→                nullptr,\n  6396→                getIRInstSpvID(loopInst->getBreakBlock()),\n  6397→                SpvSelectionControlMaskNone);\n  6398→            emitInst(\n  6399→                loopHeaderBlock,\n  6400→                nullptr,\n  6401→                SpvOpSwitch,\n  6402→                emitIntConstant(0, builder.getIntType()),\n  6403→                getIRInstSpvID(loopInst->getTargetBlock()));\n  6404→            return;\n  6405→        }\n  6406→\n  6407→        SpvLoopControlMask loopControl = SpvLoopControlMaskNone;\n  6408→        if (auto loopControlDecoration = loopInst->findDecoration<IRLoopControlDecoration>())\n  6409→        {\n  6410→            switch (loopControlDecoration->getMode())\n  6411→            {\n  6412→            case IRLoopControl::kIRLoopControl_Unroll:\n  6413→                loopControl = SpvLoopControlUnrollMask;\n  6414→                break;\n  6415→            case IRLoopControl::kIRLoopControl_Loop:\n  6416→                loopControl = SpvLoopControlDontUnrollMask;\n  6417→                break;\n  6418→            default:\n  6419→                break;\n  6420→            }\n  6421→        }\n  6422→        emitOpLoopMerge(\n  6423→            loopHeaderBlock,\n  6424→            nullptr,\n  6425→            getIRInstSpvID(loopInst->getBreakBlock()),\n  6426→            getIRInstSpvID(loopInst->getContinueBlock()),\n  6427→            loopControl);\n  6428→        emitOpBranch(loopHeaderBlock, nullptr, loopInst->getTargetBlock());\n  6429→    }\n  6430→\n  6431→    SpvInst* emitPhi(SpvInstParent* parent, IRParam* inst)\n  6432→    {\n  6433→        requireVariableBufferCapabilityIfNeeded(inst->getDataType());\n  6434→\n  6435→        // An `IRParam` in an ordinary `IRBlock` represents a phi value.\n  6436→        // We can translate them directly to SPIRV's `Phi` instruction.\n  6437→        // In order to do that, we need to figure out the source values\n  6438→        // of this `IRParam`, which can be done by looking at the users\n  6439→        // of current `IRBlock`.\n  6440→\n  6441→        // First, we find the index of this param.\n  6442→        IRBlock* block = as<IRBlock>(inst->getParent());\n  6443→        // Special case: if block is a loop's target block, emit phis into the header block instead.\n  6444→        IRInst* loopInst = nullptr;\n  6445→        if (isLoopTargetBlock(block, loopInst))\n  6446→        {\n  6447→            SpvInst* loopSpvBlockInst = nullptr;\n  6448→            m_mapIRInstToSpvInst.tryGetValue(loopInst, loopSpvBlockInst);\n  6449→            SLANG_ASSERT(loopSpvBlockInst);\n  6450→            parent = loopSpvBlockInst;\n  6451→        }\n  6452→\n  6453→        SLANG_ASSERT(block);\n  6454→        int paramIndex = getParamIndexInBlock(block, inst);\n  6455→\n  6456→        // Emit a Phi instruction.\n  6457→        auto phiSpvInst = emitInstCustomOperandFunc(\n  6458→            parent,\n  6459→            inst,\n  6460→            SpvOpPhi,\n  6461→            [&]()\n  6462→            {\n  6463→                emitOperand(inst->getFullType());\n  6464→                emitOperand(kResultID);\n  6465→                // Find phi arguments from incoming branch instructions that target `block`.\n  6466→                for (auto use = block->firstUse; use; use = use->nextUse)\n  6467→                {\n  6468→                    auto branchInst = as<IRUnconditionalBranch>(use->getUser());\n  6469→                    if (!branchInst)\n  6470→                        continue;\n  6471→                    if (branchInst->getTargetBlock() != inst->getParent())\n  6472→                        continue;\n  6473→\n  6474→                    UInt argStartIndex = 0;\n  6475→                    switch (branchInst->getOp())\n  6476→                    {\n  6477→                    case kIROp_UnconditionalBranch:\n  6478→                        argStartIndex = 1;\n  6479→                        break;\n  6480→                    case kIROp_Loop:\n  6481→                        argStartIndex = 3;\n  6482→                        break;\n  6483→                    default:\n  6484→                        // A phi argument can only come from an unconditional branch inst.\n  6485→                        // Other uses are not relavent so we should skip.\n  6486→                        continue;\n  6487→                    }\n  6488→                    SLANG_ASSERT(argStartIndex + paramIndex < branchInst->getOperandCount());\n  6489→                    auto valueInst = branchInst->getOperand(argStartIndex + paramIndex);\n  6490→                    if (isGlobalValueInst(valueInst))\n  6491→                        ensureInst(valueInst);\n  6492→                    emitOperand(getIRInstSpvID(valueInst));\n  6493→                    auto sourceBlock = as<IRBlock>(branchInst->getParent());\n  6494→                    SLANG_ASSERT(sourceBlock);\n  6495→                    emitOperand(getIRInstSpvID(sourceBlock));\n  6496→                }\n  6497→            });\n  6498→\n  6499→        maybeEmitName(phiSpvInst, inst);\n  6500→        return phiSpvInst;\n  6501→    }\n  6502→\n  6503→    SpvInst* emitCall(SpvInstParent* parent, IRCall* inst)\n  6504→    {\n  6505→        auto funcValue = inst->getCallee();\n  6506→\n  6507→        // Does this function declare any requirements.\n  6508→        handleRequiredCapabilities(funcValue);\n  6509→        requireVariableBufferCapabilityIfNeeded(inst->getDataType());\n  6510→\n  6511→        // We want to detect any call to an intrinsic operation, and inline\n  6512→        // the SPIRV snippet directly at the call site.\n  6513→        if (auto targetIntrinsic = Slang::findBestTargetIntrinsicDecoration(\n  6514→                funcValue,\n  6515→                m_targetRequest->getTargetCaps()))\n  6516→        {\n  6517→            return emitIntrinsicCallExpr(parent, static_cast<IRCall*>(inst), targetIntrinsic);\n  6518→        }\n  6519→        else if (auto spvOpDecor = funcValue->findDecorationImpl(kIROp_SPIRVOpDecoration))\n  6520→        {\n  6521→            SpvOp op = (SpvOp)getIntVal(spvOpDecor->getOperand(0));\n  6522→            List<IRInst*> args;\n  6523→            for (UInt i = 0; i < inst->getArgCount(); i++)\n  6524→                args.add(inst->getArg(i));\n  6525→            return emitInst(parent, inst, op, inst->getFullType(), kResultID, args);\n  6526→        }\n  6527→        else\n  6528→        {\n  6529→            return emitOpFunctionCall(\n  6530→                parent,\n  6531→                inst,\n  6532→                inst->getFullType(),\n  6533→                funcValue,\n  6534→                inst->getArgsList());\n  6535→        }\n  6536→    }\n  6537→\n  6538→    SpvInst* emitIntrinsicCallExpr(\n  6539→        SpvInstParent* parent,\n  6540→        IRCall* inst,\n  6541→        IRTargetIntrinsicDecoration* intrinsic)\n  6542→    {\n  6543→        SpvSnippet* snippet = getParsedSpvSnippet(intrinsic);\n  6544→        SLANG_ASSERT(snippet);\n  6545→        SpvSnippetEmitContext context;\n  6546→        context.irResultType = inst->getDataType();\n  6547→        context.resultType = ensureInst(inst->getFullType());\n  6548→        context.isResultTypeFloat = isFloatType(inst->getDataType());\n  6549→        context.isResultTypeSigned = isSignedType((IRType*)inst->getDataType());\n  6550→        for (SlangUInt i = 0; i < inst->getArgCount(); i++)\n  6551→        {\n  6552→            auto argInst = ensureInst(inst->getArg(i));\n  6553→            if (argInst)\n  6554→            {\n  6555→                context.argumentIds.add(getID(argInst));\n  6556→            }\n  6557→            else\n  6558→            {\n  6559→                context.argumentIds.add(0xFFFFFFFF);\n  6560→            }\n  6561→        }\n  6562→        // A SPIRV snippet may refer to the result type of this inst with a\n  6563→        // different IRBuilder builder(m_irModule);\n  6568→            builder.setInsertBefore(inst);\n  6569→            if (snippet->usedPtrResultTypeStorageClasses.getCount())\n  6570→                SLANG_UNIMPLEMENTED_X(\"specifying storage classes in __target_intrinsic modifiers\");\n  6571→        }\n  6572→        return emitSpvSnippet(parent, inst, context, snippet);\n  6573→    }\n  6574→\n  6575→    Dictionary<SpvSnippet::ASMConstant, SpvInst*> m_spvSnippetConstantInsts;\n  6576→\n  6577→    // Emit SPV Inst that represents a constant defined in a SpvSnippet.\n  6578→    SpvInst* maybeEmitSpvConstant(SpvSnippet::ASMConstant constant)\n  6579→    {\n  6580→        SpvInst* result = nullptr;\n  6581→        if (m_spvSnippetConstantInsts.tryGetValue(constant, result))\n  6582→            return result;\n  6583→\n  6584→        IRBuilder builder(m_irModule);\n  6585→        builder.setInsertInto(m_irModule->getModuleInst());\n  6586→        switch (constant.type)\n  6587→ makeArray(element1, element2));\n  6600→            }\n  6601→            break;\n  6602→        case SpvSnippet::ASMType::Int:\n  6603→            result = emitIntConstant((IRIntegerValue)constant.intValues[0], builder.getIntType());\n  6604→            break;\n  6605→        case SpvSnippet::ASMType::UInt16:\n  6606→            result = emitIntConstant(\n  6607→                (IRIntegerValue)constant.intValues[0],\n  6608→                builder.getType(kIROp_UInt16Type));\n  6609→            break;\n  6610→        case      makeArray(element1, element2));\n  6619→            }\n  6620→            break;\n  6621→        }\n  6622→        m_spvSnippetConstantInsts[constant] = result;\n  6623→        return result;\n  6624→    }\n  6625→\n  6626→    // Emit SPV Inst that represents a type defined in a SpvSnippet.\n  6627→    void emitSpvSnippetASMTypeOperand(SpvSnippet::ASMType type)\n  6628→    {\n  6629→     case SpvSnippet::ASMType::Float:\n  6635→            irType = builder.getType(kIROp_FloatType);\n  6636→            break;\n  6637→        case SpvSnippet::ASMType::Half:\n  6638→            irType = builder.getType(kIROp_HalfType);\n  6639→            break;\n  6640→        case SpvSnippet::ASMType::Int:\n  6641→            irType = builder.getIntType();\n  6642→            break;\n  6643→        case SpvSnippet::ASMType::UInt:\n  6644→            irType = builder.getUIntType();\n  6645→            break;\n  6646→        case SpvSnippet::ASMType::UInt16:\n  6647→            irType = builder.getType(kIROp_UInt16Type);\n  6648→            break;\n  6649→        case SpvSnippet::ASMType::Float2:\n  6650→            irType = builder.getVectorType(\n  6651→                builder.getType(kIROp_FloatType),\n  6652→                builder.getIntValue(builder.getIntType(), 2));\n  6653→            break;\n  6654→        case SpvSnippet::ASMType::UInt2:\n  6655→            irType = builder.getVectorType(\n  6656→                builder.getType(kIROp_UIntType),\n  6657→                builder.getIntValue(builder.getIntType(), 2));\n  6658→            break;\n  6659→        default:\n  6660→            SLANG_UNEXPECTED(\"unhandled case in emitSpvSnippetASMTypeOperand\");\n  6661→        }\n  6662→        emitOperand(irType);\n  6663→    }\n  6664→\n  6665→    SpvInst* emitSpvSnippet(\n  6666→        SpvInstParent* parent,\n  6667→        IRCall* inst,\n  6668→        const SpvSnippetEmitContext& context,\n  6669→        SpvSnippet* snippet)\n  6670→    {\n  6671→        ShortList<SpvInst*> emittedInsts;\n  6672→        for (Index i = 0; i < snippet->instructions.getCount(); i++)\n  6673→        {\n  6674→            auto& spvSnippetInst = snippet->instructions[i];\n  6675→            InstConstructScope scopeInst(this, (SpvOp)spvSnippetInst.opCode, nullptr);\n  6676→            SpvInst* spvInst = scopeInst;\n  6677→            for (auto operand : spvSnippetInst.operands)\n  6678→            {\n  6679→                switch (operand.type)\n  6680→                {\n  6681→                case SpvSnippet::ASMOperandType::SpvWord:\n  6682→                    emitOperand(operand.content);\n  6683→                    break;\n  6684→                case SpvSnippet::ASMOperandType::ObjectReference:\n  6685→                    SLANG_ASSERT(operand.content < (SpvWord)context.argumentIds.getCount());\n  6686→                    emitOperand(context.argumentIds[operand.content]);\n  6687→                    break;\n  6688→                case SpvSnippet::ASMOperandType::ResultId:\n  6689→                    emitOperand(kResultID);\n  6690→                    break;\n  6691→                case SpvSnippet::ASMOperandType::ResultTypeId:\n  6692→                    {\n  6693→                        emitOperand(context.resultType);\n  6694→                    }\n  6695→                    break;\n  6696→                case SpvSnippet::ASMOperandType::InstReference:\n  6697→                    SLANG_ASSERT(operand.content < (SpvWord)emittedInsts.getCount());\n  6698→                    emitOperand(emittedInsts[operand.content]);\n  6699→                    break;\n  6700→                case SpvSnippet::ASMOperandType::GLSL450ExtInstSet:\n  6701→                    emitOperand(getGLSL450ExtInst());\n  6702→                    break;\n  6703→                case SpvSnippet::ASMOperandType::FloatIntegerSelection:\n  6704→                    if (context.isResultTypeFloat)\n  6705→                    {\n  6706→                        emitOperand(operand.content);\n  6707→                    }\n  6708→                    else\n  6709→                    {\n  6710→                        emitOperand(operand.content2);\n  6711→                    }\n  6712→                    break;\n  6713→                case SpvSnippet::ASMOperandType::FloatUnsignedSignedSelection:\n  6714→                    if (context.isResultTypeFloat)\n  6715→                    {\n  6716→                        emitOperand(operand.content);\n  6717→                    }\n  6718→                    else\n  6719→                    {\n  6720→                        if (context.isResultTypeSigned)\n  6721→                        {\n  6722→                            emitOperand(operand.content3);\n  6723→                        }\n  6724→                        else\n  6725→                        {\n  6726→                            emitOperand(operand.content2);\n  6727→                        }\n  6728→                    }\n  6729→                    break;\n  6730→                case SpvSnippet::ASMOperandType::TypeReference:\n  6731→                    {\n  6732→                        emitSpvSnippetASMTypeOperand((SpvSnippet::ASMType)operand.content);\n  6733→                    }\n  6734→                    break;\n  6735→                case SpvSnippet::ASMOperandType::ConstantReference:\n  6736→                    {\n  6737→                        auto constant = snippet->constants[operand.content];\n  6738→                        if (constant.type == SpvSnippet::ASMType::FloatOrDouble)\n  6739→                        {\n  6740→                    m_targetProgram->getOptionSet(),\n  8311→                    fieldType,\n  8312→                    &sizeAlignment);\n  8313→\n  8314→                SpvInst* forwardRef = 8588→    SpvInst* emitDebugForwardRefs(IRType* type)\n  8589→    {\n  8590→        if (auto debugType = m_mapForwardRefsToDebugType.tryGetValue(type))\n  8591→            return *debugType;\n  8592→        auto result = emitDebugForwardRefsImpl(type);\n  8593→        m_mapForwardRefsToDebugType[type] = result;\n  8594→        return result;\n  8595→    }\n  8596→\n  8597→    SpvInst* emitSPIRVAsm(SpvInstParent* parent, IRSPIRVAsm* inst)\n  8598→    {\n  8599→        SpvInst* last = nullptr;\n  8600→\n  8601→        // This keeps track of the named IDs used in the asm block\n  8602→        Dictionary<UnownedStringSlice, SpvWord> idMap;\n  8603→\n  8604→        for (const auto spvInst : inst->getInsts())\n  8605→        {\n  8606→            const bool isLast = spvInst == inst->getLastChild();\n  8607→\n  8608→            const auto parentForOpCode =\n  8609→                [this](SpvOp opcode, SpvInstParent* defaultParent) -> SpvInstParent*\n  8610→            {\n  8611→                const auto info = m_grammarInfo->opInfos.lookup(opcode);\n  8612→                SLANG_ASSERT(info.has_value());\n  8613→                switch (info->class_)\n  8614→                {\n  8615→                case SPIRVCoreGrammarInfo::OpInfo::TypeDeclaration:\n  8616→                case SPIRVCoreGrammarInfo::OpInfo::ConstantCreation:\n  8617→                    return SpvOpDecorateString:\n  8637→                    case SpvOpMemberDecorate:\n  8638→                    case SpvOpMemberDecorateString:\n  8639→                        return getSection(SpvLogicalSectionID::ConstantsAndTypes);\n  8642→                    default:\n  8643→                        return defaultParent;\n  8644→                    }\n  8645→                }\n  8646→            };\n  8647→\n  8648→            const auto emitSpvAsmOperand = [&](IRSPIRVAsmOperand* operand)\n  8649→            {\n  8650→                switch (operand->getOp())\n  8651→                {\n  8652→                case kIROp_SPIRVAsmOperandEnum:\n  8653→                case kIROp_SPIRVAsmOperandLiteral:\n  8654→                    {\n  8655→                        const auto v 8669→                                    break;\n  8670→                                }\n  8671→                            case kIROp_StringLit:\n  8672→                 {\n  8680→                            switch (v->getOp())\n  8681→                            {\n  8682→                            case kIROp_StringLit:\n  8683→                   }\n  8693→                            default:\n  8694→                                SLANG_UNREACHABLE(\"Unhandled case in emitSPIRVAsm\");\n  8695→                            }\n  8696→                        }\n  8697→                        break;\n  8698→                    }\n  8699→                case kIROp_SPIRVAsmOperandInst:\n  8700→                    {\n  8701→                        const auto i = operand->getValue();\n  8702→                        emitOperand(ensureInst(i));\n  8703→\n  8704→                        break;\n  8705→                    }\n  8706→                case kIROp_SPIRVAsmOperandResult:\n  8707→                    {\n  8708→                        SLANG_ASSERT(isLast);\n  8709→                        emitOperand(kResultID);\n  8710→                        break;\n  8711→                    }\n  8712→                case kIROp_SPIRVAsmOperandId:\n  8713→                    {\n  8714→                        const auto idName =\n  8715→                            cast<IRStringLit>(operand->getValue())->getStringSlice();\n  8716→                        SpvWord id;\n  8717→                        if (!idMap.tryGetValue(idName, id))\n        emitOperand(id);\n  8723→                        break;\n  8724→                    }\n  8725→                case kIROp_SPIRVAsmOperandSampledType:\n  8726→                    {\n  8727→ kIROp_SPIRVAsmOperandTruncate)\n  8779→            {\n  8780→                const auto getSlangType = [&](IRSPIRVAsmOperand* operand) -> IRType*\n  8781→                {\n  8782→                  case kIROp_SPIRVAsmOperandSampledType:\n  8787→                        {\n  8788→                            // Make a 4 vector of the component type\n  8789→                            IRBuilder builder(m_irModule);\n  8790→                            const auto elementType = cast<IRType>(operand->getValue());\n  8791→                            return SLANG_UNEXPECTED(\"truncate should have been given slang types\");\n  8798→                    default:\n  8799→                        SLANG_UNREACHABLE(\"Unhandled case in emitSPIRVAsm\");\n  8800→                    }\n  8801→                };\n  8802→\n  8803→                SLANG_ASSERT(spvInst->getSPIRVOperands().getCount() == 4);\n  8804→                const auto toType = getSlangType(spvInst->getSPIRVOperands()[0]);\n  8805→                const auto toIdOperand = spvInst->getSPIRVOperands()[1];\n  8806→                const auto fromType =         if (!isTypeEqual(getVectorElementType(toType), fromElementType))\n  8812→                {\n  8813→                    SpvOp convertOp =\n  8814→
